items.content_html: The Obsidian Swagger Plugin is a powerful extension for Obsidian, designed to seamlessly integrate and display Swagger JSON or OpenAPI 3.0 JSON files directly within your notes. This plugin is perfect for developers and technical writers who want to embed API documentation within their Obsidian workspace.
items.title: Wanxp/obsidian-swagger: The Obsidian Swagger Plugin is a powerful extension for Obsidian, designed to seamlessly integrate and display Swagger JSON or OpenAPI 3.0 JSON files directly within your notes. This plugin is perfect for developers and technical writers who want to embed API documentation within their Obsidian workspace.
